articles.title: Trump may release US-Iran deal before Friday, Vance says
articles.description: The US vice-president says the agreement is "about a page and a half" and "very general", meaning many details will be worked out later.

articles.title: Thames Water closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
articles.description: A government spokesman tells the BBC the current offer "does not do enough to protect consumers or the environment".

articles.title: Iranian-Americans protest against Iran team at World Cup
articles.description: The BBC’s Shaimaa Khalil was outside the Iran v New Zealand opening round match as protesters called for an end to Tehran’s clerical regime.
